teams.title: Team & Group Stays
teams.description: Our Berlin Ku'damm apartment sleeps up to 6 — ideal for project teams, off-sites, and relocation stays. Three times the space of a hotel room at a comparable price.

propertyDetails.apartmentSubtitle: A designer residence in the heart of Berlin — for those who expect more.
propertyDetails.apartmentDesc1: Nestled in the heart of Berlin's most iconic boulevard, this stunning 135m² apartment offers the perfect blend of contemporary design and urban comfort. Just steps from Kurfürstendamm and Wittenbergplatz U-Bahn, you're moments from the city's finest restaurants, boutiques, and cultural landmarks.
propertyDetails.apartmentDesc2: Thoughtfully designed for up to 9 guests, the apartment features three generous bedrooms, a fully equipped open-plan kitchen, and elegant living spaces that feel more like a private residence than a rental. High ceilings, quality furnishings, and carefully curated details create an atmosphere that's both luxurious and genuinely liveable.
propertyDetails.apartmentDesc3: Whether you're planning a city break, a family trip, a group celebration, or an extended business stay — every detail has been considered so you can focus on Berlin, not logistics.
propertyDetails.highlightsSubtitle: Three reasons guests come back — and why you'll tell your friends.
propertyDetails.highlight0Body: Steps from Kurfürstendamm — Berlin's most iconic boulevard. Wittenbergplatz U-Bahn is a 3-minute walk, putting the entire city at your door.
propertyDetails.highlight1Body: Three elegant bedrooms, a spacious open-plan living and kitchen area, and two bathrooms — designed for groups who refuse to compromise on comfort.
propertyDetails.highlight2Body: Every stay includes deep cleaning, freshly laundered linen, a stocked coffee station, and 24/7 self check-in — our promise for every guest, every time.
propertyDetails.contactQuestion: Questions about this property? We're happy to help.

about.intro1: Cozy Voyage started as a result of a shared passion: travelling and connecting with people all over the world. Our first experiences hosting guests happened in Berlin, as a means of supporting ourselves in our study times, as well as having the chance to connect with different people from diverse backgrounds.
about.intro2: The idea started gaining traction as we gained experience and first hand feedback from what our guests really liked. The secret recipe was clear: human connection. That is why we decided to do this in a professional way, by extending our first raw and personal contacts into a warm and welcoming service to anyone that stays at our apartments.
about.pillar1Body: When you travel, the little things define the experience. Our designs to make your experience a home away from home. Good Wi-Fi connection in every room. Well equipped kitchen, bathroom, and living room. A cozy, tasteful space that feels like home.
about.pillar2Body: There's no call centre, no third-party property manager. When you reach out, you're talking to us. We know our apartments inside out — because we chose every piece of furniture in them.
about.pillar3Body: We've been guests ourselves hundreds of times. We know what it means to arrive tired after a long journey, or to need a recommendation at 10pm. We try to be the hosts we always wished we'd had.
about.quote: We don't rent out apartments. We share the places we love with people we hope will love them just as much — and that every stay feels unique.
about.ctaSubtext: Berlin or Dresden — we'd love to have you.
